description_long: This hammer features a robust, futuristic design with a dark blue and black color scheme accented by glowing cyan elements. The head is double-sided and blocky, with two large, flat striking faces and circular cyan highlights at the center of each side, suggesting a high-tech or sci-fi aesthetic. The handle is straight with a polygonal cross-section and includes a prominent angular side grip for enhanced control, as well as a hexagonal base. The materials appear to be primarily metal, possibly steel or a composite alloy, with some translucent or illuminated synthetic components. The surface finish is matte with some subtle gloss on the cyan highlights, and the overall build looks solid and heavy-duty. There are no visible signs of wear, branding, or additional attachments.
description: A heavy, double-sided hammer with a dark blue and black body, glowing cyan accents, and an angular side grip, giving it a futuristic, high-tech appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical double-sided head with cyan highlights and the angular side grip clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the hammer head and the straight handle with the side grip extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with both striking faces and cyan highlights visible, as well as the handle and grip.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and the handle's structure.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, polygonal metal handle with an angular side grip, matte finish, and no visible ergonomic padding.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided, blocky hammer head with large flat striking faces and circular cyan highlights, resembling a futuristic sledge or war hammer.
